summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WellTrack multi-tenant Phase 1 refactor. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified login flow, dashboard, students page, settings, and alerts page all working correctly.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - likely a race condition during initial render, charts display correctly after load
405 errors for some requests - appears to be OPTIONS preflight requests, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Multi-tenant middleware correctly resolves demo school via DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG=demo
All routes properly use Depends(get_tenant_db) for tenant-scoped database access
Cookie-based session auth working correctly with httponly, secure, samesite settings
Password hash correctly excluded from /api/auth/me response
seed_data_creation: Demo school has 16 students with SAEBRS screening data, attendance records, and alerts pre-seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant Phase 1 fully verified. TenantMiddleware resolves tenant via DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG=demo in dev mode. Demo school data is in welltrack_demo DB. All API endpoints tested: public-settings, onboarding/status, auth/login-email, auth/me, students, students/summary, analytics/tier-distribution, alerts, settings, attendance/summary, interventions, appointments, screening/sessions, reports/filter-options, audit. Frontend pages verified: login, dashboard, students, settings, alerts.
passed_tests: GET /api/students/summary returns enriched student data with tier info
GET /api/reports/filter-options returns year levels and classes
GET /api/audit returns audit log for admin
Protected endpoints correctly reject unauthenticated requests (401)
Frontend: Login page loads with email/password form
Frontend: Dashboard loads with tier distribution chart and alerts
Frontend: Students page shows 16 students with tier/risk/attendance data
Frontend: Settings page loads with branding options
Frontend: Alerts page shows 12 unread alerts
